no-sleep-till-santa-eggnog.name: No Sleep Till Santa Eggnog

ingredients.item: The bitter truth old time aromatic bitters

instructions: Combine 4 oz. cognac, 2 oz. golden rum, and 2 oz. Jamaican rum in a 16-oz. jar with 1 Tbsp. coffee beans (light roast) and allow to sit at room temperature for 4 hours. Strain and discard coffee beans.

Crack 4 large eggs into a small bowl to make sure there are no shards of shell, then add to a blender and blend on low to medium-low until very frothy, about 5 minutes. Add 8 oz. whole milk, 4 oz. heavy cream, and ½ cup demerara sugar and blend on low to medium-low to fully dissolve sugar, about 5 minutes. Slowly add infused cognac mix, 4 tsp. Pedro Ximénez sherry, and 4 dashes The Bitter Truth Old Time Aromatic Bitters and blend on low to medium-low until everything is fully integrated and mixture is frothy and aerated, about 3 minutes.

Transfer mixture to a resealable jar or bottle and allow to cool in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours. Eggnogs can age for several months when properly stored.
* Raw egg is not recommended for the elderly, pregnant women, people with weakened immune systems…or people who don’t like raw egg.

no-bake-peanut-butter-pie.name: No-bake Peanut Butter Pie
instructions: Combine cream cheese and confectioners' sugar in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer until smooth and creamy.
Add peanut butter and milk; beat until smooth.
Fold in whipped topping until well combined; spoon mixture evenly into graham cracker crusts.

nutritious-vegan-chickpea-wrap-step-by-s.name: Nutritious Vegan Chickpea Wrap, Step By Step
nutritious-vegan-chickpea-wrap-step-by-s.original_name: Nutritivo wrap de garbanzo vegano, paso a paso

ingredients.item: 1/2 taza de hojas de espinaca fresca

instructions: We start the recipe by soaking the chickpeas with water for at least 8 hours or all night. Once time goes by, rinse chickenpods or place them in a big pot, it can be clear.

Cover the chickpeas with water and add sodium bicarbonate if you choose to use them. It leads to boiling and reduces fire to slow fire. Cooking for 1 hour or till chickpeas are tender. Drain and reserve.
In a bowl, mix baked chickpeas with olive oil, salt and pepper.
Calienta las tortillas y extiende una capa de hummus en el centro. Agrega los garbanzos sazonados, las rodajas de aguacate, zanahorias ralladas, repollo morado y hojas de espinaca.
Fold the ends of the omelette and enclose it so that the ingredients are tightened. Cut as you like, we recommend you do it diagonal.
